title.en: Check out real-life AI prototypes from the Futures Lab.
title.th: Check out real-life AI prototypes from the Futures Lab.

summary.en: University of Waterloo students develop AI prototypes like sign language tutors to reshape the fut
summary.th: University of Waterloo students develop AI prototypes like sign language tutors to reshape the fut

text.en: What if you could learn Japanese through custom AI-generated stories, or practice sign language with an AI tutor that gives real-time feedback?
text.th: What if you could learn Japanese through custom AI-generated stories, or practice sign language with an AI tutor that gives real-time feedback?

text.en: These are working prototypes built by students in the Google-funded Futures Lab, a partnership with the University of Waterloo. Each lab is an eight-week intensive AI and user experience prototyping workshop. Students from diverse fields like computer science, business and natural sciences develop tools designed to reshape how we learn.
text.th: These are working prototypes built by students in the Google-funded Futures Lab, a partnership with the University of Waterloo. Each lab is an eight-week intensive AI and user experience prototyping workshop. Students from diverse fields like computer science, business and natural sciences develop tools designed to reshape how we learn.

text.en: A few highlights from the last two labs include:
text.th: A few highlights from the last two labs include:

text.en: Kanji Garden: An app that teaches Japanese through immersive, AI-generated stories and visuals instead of rote memorization.
text.th: Kanji Garden: An app that teaches Japanese through immersive, AI-generated stories and visuals instead of rote memorization.

text.en: SignFluent: A real-time American Sign Language learning tool that provides instant feedback on your form.
text.th: SignFluent: A real-time American Sign Language learning tool that provides instant feedback on your form.

text.en: MuscleMemory: An on-the-go calisthenics training tool that uses AI camera tracking to provide instant audio feedback on your exercise form, helping prevent injuries.
text.th: MuscleMemory: An on-the-go calisthenics training tool that uses AI camera tracking to provide instant audio feedback on your exercise form, helping prevent injuries.

text.en: Led by Dr. Edith Law, the Google Chair in the Future of Work and Learning, this partnership moves beyond theory, helping students co-create the very technology that will define the future of education and work.
text.th: Led by Dr. Edith Law, the Google Chair in the Future of Work and Learning, this partnership moves beyond theory, helping students co-create the very technology that will define the future of education and work.

text.en: See the projects in action and hear the students' key insights:
text.th: See the projects in action and hear the students' key insights:

text.en: The MuscleMemory team learned that non-technical skills such as applied communications skills can be valuable to a product prototyping project.
text.th: The MuscleMemory team learned that non-technical skills such as applied communications skills can be valuable to a product prototyping project.

text.en: The Kanji Garden team learned to approach challenges with a user-centered mindset.
text.th: The Kanji Garden team learned to approach challenges with a user-centered mindset.

text.en: The SignFluent team learned product design at the intersection of accessibility and technology.
text.th: The SignFluent team learned product design at the intersection of accessibility and technology.
